name: the default PR sources catalog is valid YAML that parses without error and contains a sources array
command: ruby -ryaml -e "d=YAML.load_file(ENV[\"CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\"]+\"/pr-corpus/sources/PR-SOURCES.defaults.yaml\");raise unless d[\"sources\"].is_a?(Array)&&d[\"sources\"].length==10;STDERR.puts \"ok\"" 2>err.txt && grep -q ok err.txt && echo ok 1>&2
